---
title: "takeWhile()"
description: "takeWhile: emit values while `pred` holds; on the first value that fails `pred`, COMPLETE WITHOUT emitting it (RxJS default, non-inclusive). Terminal-is-forever once it completes."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

takeWhile: emit values while `pred` holds; on the first value that fails `pred`, COMPLETE
WITHOUT emitting it (RxJS default, non-inclusive). Terminal-is-forever once it completes.

## Import

```ts
import { takeWhile } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Signature

```ts
function takeWhile(pred: (v: S) => boolean): Operator<S, S>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `pred` | `(v: S) => boolean` | pred value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `Operator<S, S>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { takeWhile } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/operators.ts`
